relationships: kab:Ula d mary ur tezmir ara ad tṛuḥ ɣer Boston
kab:Ula d nekk lliɣ ur t-ssineɣ ara
kab:Ula d tullas zemrent ad urarent ddabex n uḍar
kab:Ula d Tom ur yelli ara yettmeslay tafṛansit
kab:Ula yiwen seg yimawlan-iw ur yezmir ad ihder Tafransist
kab:Ula d nekk bɣiɣ ad mmeslayeɣ akked Tom
kab:Ula d yiwen seg yinelmaden-nni ur d-yewwiḍ deg lawan
